rulings.Case Title: ZURICH AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY VS. SANACT, INC., DBA ROTO-ROOTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 7, 2011, line 3, CROSS-DEFENDANT AMERICAN ZURICH INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS SUFFICIENTLY PLED TO SHOW AN ACTUAL CONTROVERSY EXISTS AS TO THE PARTIES CONTRACTUAL OBLIGATIONS AND LIABILITIES. FURTHER, THE UCL CLAIM IS PREMISSIBLE. SEE ZHANG V. SUPERIOR COURT (2010) 178 CAL.APP.4TH 1081. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: AMY MARQUES VS. JAMES GALLAGHER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 7, 2011, line 3, PLAINTIFF AMY MARQUES Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery; Request For Sanctions. MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY REQUEST IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE MORE SPECIFIC INFORMATION, INCLUDING NAMES, ADDRESSES AND PHONE NUMBERS, AND FACTUAL INFORMATION THAT IS RESPONSIVE TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS GRANTED. DEFENSE COUNSEL MUST REMIT $1,727.50 TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW S. PARK et al VS. R.C. CHRONICLE BUILDING L.P. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 7, 2011, line 8, DEFENDANT HSBC MORTGAGE CORPORATION (USA) DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS THAT SHOW THE TIME AND MANNER OF DISCOVERY OF THE MISREPRESENTATION/FRAUD AND PLAINTIFF'S INABILITY TO HAVE MADE THE DISCOVERY. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ALL ACTIONS PLAINTIFF CLAIMS DEFENDANT HSBC ENGAGED IN OCCURRED PRIOR TO TIME THE CONTRACT WAS ENTERED INTO AND, THEREFORE, COULD NOT HAVE INTERFERRED WITH THE PERFORMANCE OR ENFORCEMENT OF THE CONTRACT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUFFICIENTLY PLED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. UNCONSCIONABILITY IS NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. WHILE DEFENDANT IS CORRECT THAT THERE IS NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT, PLAINTIFFS HAVE STATED ENOUGH FOR RELIEF IN THE FORM OF RESTITUTION. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 14TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. THE ACCOUNTING CAUSE OF ACTION STANDS ALONE AND PLEADS ADEQUATE FACTS TO SHOW THAT AN ACCOUNTING IS NECESSARY. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 15TH-17TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THESE CAUSES OF ACTION RELY ON THE UNDERLYING FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION AND THEREFORE FAIL FOR THE SAME REASONS SET FORTH ABOVE. =(302/LMG)
